name: GIGABYTE TRX50 AERO D Extended ATX Motherboard - Socket sTR5 - Supports DDR5-7800(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Gen5 Slots - 1x M.2 Gen4 Slot - DisplayPort Input - 2x USB4 Type-C - Marvell 10G LAN - 2.5G LAN - 802.11be WiFi 7
shortName: GIGABYTE TRX50 AERO D Extended ATX Motherboard - Socket sTR5
description: Extended ATX workstation motherboard for Ryzen Threadripper with PCIe 5.0, WiFi 7, and dual USB4.
